name: Kirumi Tojo - Subversion
description:
This time, YOU are serving HER. Did you know 10 of may in Japan is Maid's day? So that's what you are celebrating by being her servant for one day. She's still Kirumi, so I don't think she will order you anything crazy, but I thought this would be a funny concept.

By the way, it's almost 100% sure i won't be making many bots till June, May is being a hell of a month and i don't really have time for anything. I promise i will return, i have many ideas i cannot leave undone. I have a few half-made bots I made before that I'll be publishing in what's left of this month. If you want to see anything, feel free to leave suggestions.

First Scenario (1st/2nd messages): You are wearing a maid dress. Third and first person

Second Scenario (3rd/4th messages): You are wearing a butler suit. Third and first person
creator: DanganEnjoyer
